name: ohos-battery-manager
description: Battery information query tool for querying battery capacity and energy status. Used for system administration, monitoring, and troubleshooting battery-related issues. Not applicable for real-time battery monitoring or subscription-based battery event tracking.

output.description: Battery capacity result with standard JSON structure

data.description: Core business data (only present when status is success)

error_code.description: Standard error code (only present when status is error)

error_msg.description: Human-readable error message with troubleshooting suggestions (only present when status is error)

output.description: Battery total energy result with standard JSON structure

data.description: Core business data (only present when status is success)

error_code.description: Standard error code (only present when status is error)

error_msg.description: Human-readable error message with troubleshooting suggestions (only present when status is error)

output.description: Battery remaining energy result with standard JSON structure

data.description: Core business data (only present when status is success)

error_code.description: Standard error code (only present when status is error)
